intentSynonyms: search for addresses and places in uber
search for pickup or dropoff locations by text query and coordinates in uber
description: Search for pickup or dropoff locations by text query and coordinates. Returns matching addresses, landmarks, airports, and restaurants. Use the returned place ID with other Uber tools.

query.description: Search text (e.g., "SFO", "Golden Gate Bridge", "123 Main St")

latitude.description: Latitude for the search center (e.g., 37.7749 for San Francisco)

longitude.description: Longitude for the search center (e.g., -122.4194 for San Francisco)

type.description: Search type — PICKUP or DROPOFF. Default PICKUP.
